metric_definitions.attempt_pass_rate_range: Descriptive min-max of complete per-attempt semantic pass rates across tasks; this stochastic range is not a confidence interval.
metric_definitions.budgeted_pass_rate: PASS / (PASS + REJECT + TIME_LIMIT); INFRA_BLOCKED is excluded.
metric_definitions.duration: For semantic PASS/REJECT rows: agent_elapsed_sec + verifier_elapsed_sec when both are available, otherwise duration_sec; infrastructure and time-limit rows are excluded.
metric_definitions.provider_output_tok_s: Median of finite runtime_metrics.throughput.output_tok_s values; provider-reported/generated-duration throughput, not end-to-end speed.
metric_definitions.semantic_pass_rate: PASS / (PASS + REJECT); INFRA_BLOCKED and TIME_LIMIT are excluded.
metric_definitions.token_cache_totals: Complete totals are null unless every semantic row has a finite value; observed sums and coverage are always retained.
metric_definitions.wall_output_tok_s: Median of finite runtime_metrics.throughput.wall_output_tok_s values; reported separately from provider throughput.

attempt_pass_rate_range.definition: Descriptive minimum and maximum semantic pass rates across repeated attempt numbers; not a confidence interval.

throughput.definition: Provider-reported/generated-duration throughput from runtime_metrics.throughput.output_tok_s; not end-to-end speed.

throughput.definition: Provider-reported/generated-duration throughput from runtime_metrics.throughput.output_tok_s; not end-to-end speed.
